oberon0-runtime documentation¶

Add your content using reStructuredText syntax. See the reStructuredText documentation for details.

Oberon0 runtime for WASM module

oberon0_runtime.info(wasm_file: ~typing.Annotated[~typer.models.FileBinaryRead, <typer.models.ArgumentInfo object at 0x000001FD0CC116A0>]) → None¶

Print the list of commands available in the given WASM file.

oberon0_runtime.run(wasm_file: ~typing.Annotated[~typer.models.FileBinaryRead, <typer.models.ArgumentInfo object at 0x000001FD0B777110>], command: ~typing.Annotated[str, <typer.models.ArgumentInfo object at 0x000001FD0B777250>], numbers: ~typing.Annotated[list[int] | None, <typer.models.ArgumentInfo object at 0x000001FD0B777390>] = None, debug: bool = False) → None¶

Run the given command from the given WASM file with the provided input numbers.
